title: Stitched in Stores
excerpt: It seems more and more stores are getting my latest collection, Stitched in! Excited to see what you all make with the goodies. There are some step by step instructions for completing a layout up at the Simon Says Stamp…
body:
It seems more and more stores are getting my latest collection, Stitched in! Excited to see what you all make with the goodies. There are some step by step instructions for completing a layout up at the Simon Says Stamp blog today. Their shop is stocked with the newest products from Stitched! Also, if you are in Florida, perhaps you will join me and Kelly Purkey for a fun day of classes at Whim So Doodle on Saturday November 8!

I'll be showing you how to put together a couple layouts and a Project Life spread using Stitched items as well as exclusives only available with the class kit. You'll have plenty of leftover items to make other projects! Hope to see some of you at Whim So Doodle!
